name: Magic Move
original_name: ทำนายทายรัก
overview: An architecture student accidentally rises to fame as a campus fortune teller after claiming he was once the childhood ship partner of a real estate heir. What starts as a lie slowly turns into true love—just as a failed K-pop hopeful returns to find his own lost ship partner, who happens to be the same heir.
